description: Curated golden cases for BriefAlpha pipeline regression. Each case carries an evidence_pool_full snapshot + expected metrics. Runner in `tests/golden/runner.py` re-runs the pipeline + accuracy_validator against each case and emits a metrics report.

cases.summary: NVDA earnings beat reported by 4 sources, all directional alignment.
NVDA Q1 guidance cut. Reuters quotes 8%, Bloomberg quotes 10% — flagged conflict.
Williams 'mildly restrictive' speech; rates desk reaction in 3 sources.
Light news flow; expected output reverts to base_case + summary only.
Single-source breaking — should mark requires_review until corroborated.
PCE prints in line; macro_pulse only.
Tencent buyback authorization; should pull HKEX 7:30 HKT filing as primary.
Revenue warning 8-K — official tier wins primary slot.
Goldman PDF mentions BIDU (external) — pool ingests with warning, no universe expansion.
